name: create_customer
description: Create a new customer record for a business with name, email, address, and other contact information. Returns the newly created customer object with its ID.

parameters.name: businessId
parameters.description: The ID of the business to add the customer to.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The full name of the customer or company.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The customer's email address for invoicing.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The currency code for this customer (e.g., USD, CAD).

body.query: mutation($input: CustomerCreateInput!) { customerCreate(input: $input) { customer { id name email } didSucceed inputErrors { path message code } } }
